title: senecio eriopus
intro: Senecio eriopus, also known as ragwort or groundsel, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, containing alkaloids like juncin and eriopsin, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Senecio eriopus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Senecio eriopus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to soothe respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
